intent: 2-bedroom where each bedroom has its own private ensuite — no common bath. The two ensuites share a plumbing wall so the wet core stays concentrated. Useful for rental properties (each bedroom independently let), two-couple shares (each gets a private bath), or 'primary + Jr suite' layouts.
must_haves: twin ensuites — one private bath per bedroom
two ensuites share a plumbing wall (single wet stack)
